overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a cloaked character walking through a foggy, fern-filled village courtyard with a central bonfire, approaching and entering a wooden shrine with a burning doorway. The atmosphere is misty and atmospheric with dense vegetation and traditional wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty village courtyard with ritual bonfire

events.description: character walks past the central bonfire, moving from right to left of frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the misty courtyard past the central bonfire toward the wooden shrine ahead

entered.detail: circular stone fire pit with active flames in the center of the courtyard
traditional wooden structure with curved Nordic-style roof and ornate carvings
rough stone wall running along the left side of the courtyard
tall wooden gate structure with horizontal beams marking the shrine approach
lush green fern plants lining both sides of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy open courtyard surrounded by dense ferns and stone walls. A ritual bonfire burns brightly to the right, casting flickering light on the wet ground as the character moves toward a distant wooden shrine with traditional curved roofing.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient wooden shrine entrance with burning threshold

events.description: moving from open courtyard into the covered shrine entrance area
approaching the burning doorway, firelight becomes the dominant illumination source

agents.ego_description: approaching and stepping through the burning doorway of the wooden shrine, entering the interior

entered.detail: ornate wooden doorway with curved roof overhang and carved support pillars
doorway threshold engulfed in flames creating a barrier of fire
thick carved wooden posts flanking the shrine entrance
weathered stone steps leading up to the shrine entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the shrine entrance, moving from the open courtyard into a covered doorway area. The wooden structure looms large with its curved roof and carved pillars, while flames flicker across the threshold. The bonfire and gate recede behind as the character steps through the burning doorway into the shrine interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty, open-air courtyard into the fiery threshold of a traditional wooden shrine. It begins with the character walking through dense ferns and past stone walls, while a ritual bonfire to the right casts flickering light across the wet ground. As the character advances, the open space narrows and the wooden shrine with its curved roofing looms larger, drawing the camera toward the entrance. The scene then shifts from the cool fog of the courtyard to the intense glow of the doorway, where carved pillars frame a threshold of leaping flames. Finally, the bonfire and outer gate recede into the distance as the character steps through the burning entrance and into the shrine's interior.
